title: Present Simple Tense
description: Learn when and how to use the present simple tense
summary_pt_br: Presente simples em inglês — formas afirmativas, negativas e interrogativas para rotinas diárias.

exercises.question: She ___ to school every day.
exercises.explanation: We use 'goes' for he/she/it in present simple. Add -es to verbs ending in -o.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Para he/she/it, adicionamos -s ou -es ao verbo.

exercises.question: They ___ (not/like) coffee.
exercises.explanation: Use 'don't' + base verb for negatives with I/you/we/they.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Use 'don't' + verbo na forma base para frases negativas com I/you/we/they.

exercises.question: ___ he play football on weekends?
exercises.explanation: Use 'Does' for questions with he/she/it in present simple.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Para perguntas com he/she/it, usamos 'Does' no início.

exercises.explanation: These are common daily routine phrases using present simple.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Essas são frases comuns sobre rotina diária.

exercises.question: My mother ___ (work) at a hospital.
exercises.explanation: For he/she/it, add -s to the base verb: work → works.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Para he/she/it, adicione -s ao verbo: work → works.

scenes.subtitle_en: Learn when and how to use the present simple tense

exercise.explanation: We use 'goes' for he/she/it in present simple. Add -es to verbs ending in -o.

exercise.hint_pt_br: Para perguntas com he/she/it, usamos 'Does' no início.

exercise.explanation: These are common daily routine phrases using present simple.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Essas são frases comuns sobre rotina diária.

scenes.title: Present simple drill
scenes.pt_summary: Present simple em perguntas do dia a dia.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What do you do every morning?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I wake up and drink coffee.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I work at a tech company.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Does your brother live with you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: No, he lives in another city.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What do you do on weekends?
turns.pt: O que faz no fim de semana?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I play tennis and read books.

scenes.title: Listening story — Present Simple Tense
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça a situação com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que você entendeu — resumo, detalhes, seus pensamentos. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Write in English what you heard. A short summary is fine. Mention who spoke, what they said, and what you think about the situation.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que você ouviu. Pode ser um resumo curto. Diga quem falou, o que disseram e o que você achou.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In this story, we meet Interviewer and a student. Learn when and how to use the present simple tense Listen carefully and think about what each person says.

paragraphs.speaker: Interviewer
paragraphs.en: What do you do every morning?

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: I wake up and drink coffee.

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: I work at a tech company.

paragraphs.speaker: Interviewer
paragraphs.en: Does your brother live with you?

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: No, he lives in another city.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: That is the end of our short scene with Interviewer. Think about what you heard and how the conversation felt.
